title: English for Remote Worker v3 - Conversation Scripts

scripts.en: Hi, I'm Cecep Azhar — a full-stack developer specializing in Go, HTMX, and AI agent systems.
scripts.translation: Hai, saya Cecep Azhar — full-stack developer spesialisasi Go, HTMX, dan sistem AI agent.

scripts.en: I help businesses automate workflows and build scalable web platforms.
scripts.translation: Saya bantu bisnis otomasi alur kerja dan bangun platform web scalable.

scripts.en: I've delivered 6+ products across 3 countries, available for new projects.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah deliver 6+ produk di 3 negara, tersedia untuk proyek baru.

scripts.en: Hi, my name is Cecep Azhar. I'm a full-stack developer from Indonesia with X years of experience.
scripts.translation: Hai, nama saya Cecep Azhar. Saya full-stack developer dari Indonesia dengan pengalaman X tahun.

scripts.en: My primary stack is Go with Echo, HTMX for frontend, and PostgreSQL.
scripts.translation: Stack utama saya Go dengan Echo, HTMX untuk frontend, dan PostgreSQL.

scripts.en: I've been building AI agent systems that automate customer support and workflows.
scripts.translation: Saya membangun sistem AI agent yang otomasi customer support dan alur kerja.

scripts.en: I run FathForce — we go from solo developer to a full agency powered by AI.
scripts.translation: Saya jalankan FathForce — dari developer solo jadi agensi penuh didukung AI.

scripts.en: What do you do?
scripts.translation: Apa yang kamu kerjakan?

scripts.en: I build web apps and AI-powered tools for businesses.
scripts.translation: Saya bangun aplikasi web dan tools AI untuk bisnis.

scripts.en: What's your tech stack?
scripts.translation: Apa tech stack kamu?

scripts.en: Go, Echo, HTMX, Tailwind, PostgreSQL, LLM-based AI agents.
scripts.translation: Go, Echo, HTMX, Tailwind, PostgreSQL, AI agent berbasis LLM.

scripts.en: How long have you been doing this?
scripts.translation: Sudah berapa lama?

scripts.en: Over X years, focused on Go and AI for the past few.
scripts.translation: Lebih dari X tahun, fokus Go dan AI beberapa tahun terakhir.

scripts.en: What projects have you worked on?
scripts.translation: Proyek apa yang pernah dikerjakan?

scripts.en: SaaS, e-commerce, WhatsApp bots, and custom AI agents.
scripts.translation: SaaS, e-commerce, WhatsApp bot, dan AI agent custom.

scripts.en: Are you freelance?
scripts.translation: Kamu freelance?

scripts.en: I run my own agency. Also available for consulting.
scripts.translation: Saya punya agensi sendiri. Juga tersedia konsultasi.

scripts.en: Tell me about yourself.
scripts.translation: Ceritakan tentang diri kamu.

scripts.en: I'm a full-stack dev with X years specializing in Go, PostgreSQL, HTMX, and recently AI agent systems.
scripts.translation: Saya full-stack dev X tahun spesialisasi Go, PostgreSQL, HTMX, dan terakhir sistem AI agent.

scripts.en: Why should we hire you?
scripts.translation: Kenapa kami harus hire kamu?

scripts.en: I bring end-to-end capability — DB design to deployment. I ship fast and communicate clearly.
scripts.translation: Saya punya kemampuan end-to-end — desain DB sampai deployment. Cepat deliver, komunikasi jelas.

scripts.en: What's your strength?
scripts.translation: Apa kelebihan kamu?

scripts.en: I'm pragmatic — ship working software over over-engineering. Pick the right tools.
scripts.translation: Saya pragmatis — deliver software yang works daripada over-engineering. Pilih tools tepat.

scripts.en: What's your weakness?
scripts.translation: Apa kelemahan kamu?

scripts.en: I sometimes over-optimize before validation. I've learned to ship first, optimize later.
scripts.translation: Kadang over-optimize sebelum validasi. Saya sudah belajar deliver dulu, optimasi belakangan.

scripts.en: Tell me about a challenging project.
scripts.translation: Ceritakan proyek yang menantang.

scripts.en: Multi-tenant SaaS, 10K+ daily users. Challenge: data isolation plus real-time. Solution: connection pooling, Redis, HTMX.
scripts.translation: SaaS multi-tenant, 10K+ user per hari. Tantangan: isolasi data dan real-time. Solusi: pooling, Redis, HTMX.

scripts.en: How do you handle tight deadlines?
scripts.translation: Bagaimana kamu handle deadline ketat?

scripts.en: Break into small deliverables, prioritize MVP, communicate early if blocked.
scripts.translation: Pecah jadi deliverable kecil, prioritaskan MVP, komunikasi awal kalau blocked.

scripts.en: Where do you see yourself in 5 years?
scripts.translation: Di mana kamu dalam 5 tahun?

scripts.en: Leading AI-powered product architecture. Bridging traditional software engineering with AI revolution.
scripts.translation: Memimpin arsitektur produk AI. Menjembatani SE tradisional dengan revolusi AI.

scripts.en: What's your salary expectation?
scripts.translation: Berapa ekspektasi gaji kamu?

scripts.en: $2,500 to $3,500 per month full-time, or $50 to $80 per hour contract.
scripts.translation: $2,500 sampai $3,500 per bulan full-time, atau $50 sampai $80 per jam kontrak.

scripts.en: Could you clarify the constraints? Speed, memory, or readability?
scripts.translation: Bisa jelaskan constraint-nya? Kecepatan, memori, atau keterbacaan?

scripts.en: Let me think. I'd identify the bottleneck, then compare approach A vs B.
scripts.translation: Saya pikirkan. Saya identifikasi bottleneck, lalu bandingkan pendekatan A vs B.

scripts.en: Haven't used that library, but the concept is similar to X. I can learn quickly.
scripts.translation: Belum pakai library itu, tapi konsepnya mirip X. Saya bisa cepat belajar.

scripts.en: Summary: I'd use X because of the reason. Does that align?
scripts.translation: Ringkasan: Saya pakai X karena alasan. Sesuai?

scripts.en: Can you walk me through your recent projects?
scripts.translation: Bisa ceritakan proyek terakhir kamu?

scripts.en: My flagship project is GCC — all-in-one business platform with Go, Echo, HTMX, PostgreSQL. Handles CRM, project management, and AI capabilities for 200+ users.
scripts.translation: Proyek unggulan saya GCC — platform bisnis all-in-one dengan Go, Echo, HTMX, PostgreSQL. Handle CRM, manajemen proyek, dan AI untuk 200+ pengguna.

scripts.en: I also built FathStore headless e-commerce, ProTool internal dashboards, and several AI agents for customer support using LLMs and RAG pipelines.
scripts.translation: Saya juga bangun FathStore e-commerce headless, ProTool dashboard internal, dan beberapa AI agent untuk customer support pakai LLM dan RAG.

scripts.en: I'm proud that I reduced page load from 3.2 seconds to under 800 milliseconds by switching from React to HTMX and optimizing DB queries.
scripts.translation: Saya bangga bisa kurangi page load dari 3,2 detik jadi di bawah 800 milidetik dengan migrasi React ke HTMX dan optimasi query DB.

scripts.en: What are your key strengths?
scripts.translation: Apa kekuatan utama kamu?

scripts.en: First, fast learner — I went from zero to production AI agents in 6 weeks. Second, pragmatic — Go for performance, HTMX for simplicity. Third, full-stack solo — DB to Docker to Cloudflare, very efficient for small teams.
scripts.translation: Pertama, cepat belajar — dari nol sampai AI agent production dalam 6 minggu. Kedua, pragmatis — Go untuk performa, HTMX untuk kesederhanaan. Ketiga, full-stack solo — DB sampai Docker sampai Cloudflare, sangat efisien untuk tim kecil.

scripts.en: What's your biggest weakness?
scripts.translation: Apa kelemahan terbesar kamu?

scripts.en: I tend to take on too many things — because I can do full-stack, I try to handle everything myself. I'm improving by delegating and building a small team. Also, I sometimes over-optimize before validation. Now I ship first, optimize later.
scripts.translation: Saya cenderung ambil terlalu banyak — karena bisa full-stack, saya coba handle sendiri semua. Saya perbaiki dengan delegasi dan bangun tim kecil. Juga, kadang over-optimize sebelum validasi. Sekarang deliver dulu, optimasi belakangan.

scripts.en: What are your salary expectations?
scripts.translation: Berapa ekspektasi gaji kamu?

scripts.en: Based on my SaaS experience, AI skills, and Go expertise, I'm looking at $2,500 to $3,500 per month.
scripts.translation: Berdasarkan pengalaman SaaS, keahlian AI, dan keahlian Go, saya minta $2,500 sampai $3,500 per bulan.

scripts.en: That's above our budget. We were thinking around $2,000.
scripts.translation: Itu di atas budget kami. Kami berpikir sekitar $2,000.

scripts.en: I understand. However, I handle full-stack alone — backend, frontend, DB, DevOps, AI — no extra hires needed. The cost savings are significant.
scripts.translation: Saya paham. Tapi saya handle full-stack sendiri — backend, frontend, DB, DevOps, AI — tanpa rekrut tambahan. Penghematannya signifikan.

scripts.en: Could we start at $2,000 with a review after 3 months based on performance? If I deliver, we adjust to $2,500.
scripts.translation: Bisa mulai $2,000 dengan review setelah 3 bulan berdasarkan performa? Kalau saya deliver, kita naikkan ke $2,500.

scripts.en: That works. $2,000 starting, performance review at 3 months.
scripts.translation: Oke. Mulai $2,000, review performa di 3 bulan.

scripts.en: Great. Can we document this in the offer letter?
scripts.translation: Bagus. Bisa didokumentasikan di offer letter?

scripts.en: What's your hourly rate?
scripts.translation: Berapa tarif per jam kamu?

scripts.en: $50 per hour. For longer engagement, 3 months or more, I can do $45 per hour. Or monthly retainer of $2,000 for up to 50 hours.
scripts.translation: $50 per jam. Untuk kontrak panjang, 3 bulan atau lebih, bisa $45 per jam. Atau retainer bulanan $2,000 untuk maksimal 50 jam.

scripts.en: My minimum for this type of work is $2,000 per month.
scripts.translation: Minimum saya $2,000 per bulan.

scripts.en: This reflects my X years and specialized Go plus AI skills.
scripts.translation: Ini mencerminkan X tahun dan keahlian Go plus AI saya.

scripts.en: My standard is $80 per hour, but I'm flexible for the right opportunity.
scripts.translation: Standar saya $80 per jam, tapi fleksibel untuk peluang tepat.

scripts.en: I include docs, deployment, and 30-day post-launch support.
scripts.translation: Saya sertakan dokumentasi, deployment, dan support 30 hari pasca-launch.

scripts.en: That's below my minimum. I need at least $2,000.
scripts.translation: Itu di bawah minimum saya. Saya butuh minimal $2,000.

scripts.en: I agree.
scripts.translation: Saya setuju.

scripts.en: I will deploy.
scripts.translation: Saya akan deploy.

scripts.en: I have a lot of experience.
scripts.translation: Saya punya banyak pengalaman.

scripts.en: Explain it to me.
scripts.translation: Jelaskan ke saya.

scripts.en: I have been working since 2020.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah kerja sejak 2020.

scripts.en: Discuss it.
scripts.translation: Bahas itu.

scripts.en: I'll get back to you.
scripts.translation: Saya balas kamu.

scripts.en: Handle this.
scripts.translation: Handle ini.

scripts.en: I have built 6 products.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah bangun 6 produk.

scripts.en: I worked at Company X from 2020 to 2023.
scripts.translation: Saya kerja di Company X dari 2020 sampai 2023.

scripts.en: Rolling out new feature tomorrow.
scripts.translation: Deploy fitur baru besok.

scripts.en: Build broke down after commit.
scripts.translation: Build gagal setelah commit.

scripts.en: Figured out the race condition.
scripts.translation: Sudah pecahkan race condition.

scripts.en: I'll look into the memory leak.
scripts.translation: Saya investigasi memory leak.

scripts.en: Hand off to ops team.
scripts.translation: Transfer ke tim ops.

scripts.en: Came up with better architecture.
scripts.translation: Ciptakan arsitektur yang lebih baik.

scripts.en: Good morning everyone. Thank you for joining.
scripts.translation: Selamat pagi semua. Terima kasih sudah bergabung.

scripts.en: Today I'll cover three main areas.
scripts.translation: Hari ini saya bahas 3 area utama.

scripts.en: Now let's move on to performance results.
scripts.translation: Sekarang lanjut ke hasil performa.

scripts.en: In simple terms, the server responds 3 times faster.
scripts.translation: Dalam istilah sederhana, server merespon 3 kali lebih cepat.

scripts.en: Think of it as a cache between app and database.
scripts.translation: Anggap sebagai cache antara aplikasi dan database.

scripts.en: Let me show you how this works in practice.
scripts.translation: Saya tunjukkan bagaimana ini bekerja.

scripts.en: To wrap up, here are the key takeaways.
scripts.translation: Untuk menutup, ini poin pentingnya.

scripts.en: Happy to take questions. I'll follow up on anything I can't answer now.
scripts.translation: Senang jawab pertanyaan. Saya follow up yang belum bisa dijawab sekarang.

scripts.en: On track. API complete, frontend 80% done.
scripts.translation: On track. API selesai, frontend 80%.

scripts.en: 3 days behind due to auth integration.
scripts.translation: Terlambat 3 hari karena integrasi auth.

scripts.en: Blocked on X. Need API keys from client.
scripts.translation: Blocked di X. Butuh API key dari klien.

scripts.en: Ahead of schedule. Can pull forward the feature.
scripts.translation: Lebih cepat. Bisa majukan fitur.

scripts.en: Completed 12 out of 15 story points this sprint.
scripts.translation: Selesaikan 12 dari 15 story point sprint ini.

scripts.en: What went well: CI/CD cut deploy time by 60%.
scripts.translation: Yang baik: CI/CD potong waktu deploy 60%.

scripts.en: To improve: test coverage at 45%, target 70%.
scripts.translation: Perbaikan: test coverage 45%, target 70%.

scripts.en: Great error logging — very thorough.
scripts.translation: Error logging bagus — sangat lengkap.

scripts.en: Suggestion: extract logic into reusable service.
scripts.translation: Saran: ekstrak logika jadi service reusable.

scripts.en: I'll own the task, ready by Thursday.
scripts.translation: Saya ambil task, siap Kamis.

scripts.en: Let's circle back Friday.
scripts.translation: Mari follow up Jumat.

scripts.en: What pain points are you trying to solve?
scripts.translation: Masalah apa yang ingin dipecahkan?

scripts.en: Here's my proposal for the initial scope.
scripts.translation: Ini usulan saya untuk scope awal.

scripts.en: For this complexity: $5,000, timeline 6 weeks.
scripts.translation: Untuk kompleksitas ini: $5,000, timeline 6 minggu.

scripts.en: Great idea. Let's add that as Phase 2.
scripts.translation: Ide bagus. Tambah Fase 2.

scripts.en: Friendly reminder — Invoice number X was due on the date.
scripts.translation: Reminder — Invoice nomor X jatuh tempo tanggal.

scripts.en: Need at least X weeks for quality delivery.
scripts.translation: Butuh minimal X minggu untuk kualitas baik.

scripts.en: All deliverables complete. Here's the checklist.
scripts.translation: Semua deliverable selesai. Ini checklist.

scripts.en: I offer 30-day post-launch support.
scripts.translation: Saya tawarkan support 30 hari pasca-launch.

scripts.en: Would you provide a testimonial?
scripts.translation: Bisa kasih testimoni?

scripts.en: We found your profile. Interested in remote work?
scripts.translation: Kami temukan profil kamu. Tertarik kerja remote?

scripts.en: Absolutely! Working remotely for X years with clients in Indonesia, Singapore, and the US. Comfortable with async communication and timezone overlap.
scripts.translation: Tentu! Kerja remote X tahun dengan klien di Indonesia, Singapura, dan AS. Nyaman komunikasi async dan timezone overlap.

scripts.en: I use Slack, Notion, GitHub. Proactive with daily updates and thorough documentation.
scripts.translation: Saya pakai Slack, Notion, GitHub. Proaktif update harian dan dokumentasi lengkap.

scripts.en: We're in US Eastern Time. Can you work our hours?
scripts.translation: Kami di AS Eastern Time. Bisa kerja jam kami?

scripts.en: I'm in WIB, UTC+7, 12 hours behind Eastern Time. Available 8 PM to 12 AM WIB equals your 8 AM to 12 PM Eastern. Flexible for important meetings.
scripts.translation: Saya WIB, UTC+7, selisih 12 jam. Available jam 8 sampai 12 malam WIB sama dengan jam 8 sampai 12 pagi Eastern. Fleksibel untuk meeting penting.

scripts.en: How do you handle payments?
scripts.translation: Bagaimana cara bayar?

scripts.en: Monthly invoices with detailed hours. I accept Wise, PayPal, or bank transfer. For new clients: 30% deposit upfront, 70% on delivery. Net-15 terms.
scripts.translation: Invoice bulanan dengan detail jam. Saya terima Wise, PayPal, atau transfer bank. Klien baru: deposit 30% di muka, 70% saat deliver. Net-15.

scripts.en: What contract are you looking for?
scripts.translation: Kontrak seperti apa yang kamu cari?

scripts.en: Monthly retainer — X hours per month, minimum 3-month commitment. 14-day notice to end. All code and IP transfers to you.
scripts.translation: Monthly retainer — X jam per bulan, komitmen minimal 3 bulan. Pemberitahuan 14 hari untuk berhenti. Semua kode dan IP milik Anda.

scripts.en: PR number 42 ready for review.
scripts.translation: PR nomor 42 siap di-review.

scripts.en: Heads down on API refactor. Update at end of day.
scripts.translation: Fokus refactor API. Update akhir hari.

scripts.en: Out of office tomorrow. Name covers urgent.
scripts.translation: Tidak ada besok. Nama cover urgent.

scripts.en: Escalating — production DB showing degradation.
scripts.translation: Eskalasi — DB production mulai degradasi.

scripts.en: Signing off. All tasks on track. See you tomorrow!
scripts.translation: Selesai hari ini. Semua task on track. Sampai besok!

scripts.en: I believe this approach will work best.
scripts.translation: Saya yakin pendekatan ini akan paling berhasil.

scripts.en: Let me check.
scripts.translation: Saya cek dulu.

scripts.en: I architected and designed the system.
scripts.translation: Saya mendesain dan membangun sistem.
